headline: Woman's Left And Right Eyebrows Have A Disagreement, She Looks Permanently Skeptical
summary: The left eyebrow arches. The right eyebrow stays straight. She's been 'judging' for 3 days.
fullBody: Amanda McBrow has discovered her eyebrows are 'in conflict.' 'The left eyebrow arches,' Amanda said. 'The right eyebrow stays straight.' She has been 'permanently skeptical' for 3 days. 'People think I'm judging them,' Amanda said. 'I'm just trying to have normal eyebrows.' Her eyebrows are now in 'mediation.'
